CREATE TABLE test_files (file_id INT PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(255), owner_user VARCHAR(255), owner_group VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_files (file_id, file_name, owner_user, owner_group) VALUES (1, 'file1.txt', 'user1', 'group1');
INSERT INTO test_files (file_id, file_name, owner_user, owner_group) VALUES (2, 'file2.txt', 'user2', 'group2');
SELECT os_chown('test_files/file1.txt', 'user1', 'group1') AS result FROM test_files WHERE file_id = 1;
SELECT os_chown(f.file_name, 'virtuoso', 'virtuoso') FROM test_files f WHERE f.owner_user = 'user1' ORDER BY f.file_id;
SELECT os_chown(f.file_name, 'virtuoso', (SELECT g.group_name FROM user_groups g WHERE g.user_name = 'user1')) FROM test_files f;
SELECT os_chown(t.file_name, 'user' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_files), 'group' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_files)) FROM test_files t;
